_comment: Tool-name → minimal JSON-Schema-ish spec consumed by .pi/extensions/tool-call-repair.ts (validated by src/toolcall/repair.mjs). Keys are tool names; each value is { required?, properties?: {field:{type}}, additionalProperties? }. Example tools below are illustrative — add entries for the flaky-model tools you actually want to guard. Do NOT over-constrain Pi built-ins (read/write/bash/edit) unless the schema matches their real signature, or valid calls will be blocked. Keys starting with _ are ignored by the loader as documentation.
